revision.comment: Bot: created missing page [[Talk:Futako Shrine]] redirect to enwiki [[Talk:Futako Shrine]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: remove deleted category Automatic wikipedia redirects
Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (ja:二子神社, en:Futako Shrine); add local discussion section + dated import note

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Futako_Shrine here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Futako_Shrine for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{talk page header}}

<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers -->
<!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->

== Local discussion ==
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:34, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
<!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->

== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/91959007 revision]) ==
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:34, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
<!-- Source: ja:Talk:二子神社 | revid=91959007 -->
{{talkheader}}
{{出典検索}}
== 第4回 ウィキペディア街道 大山道 二子玉川 ==
2015年11月3日のイベントにおいて、[[二子神社]]と[[行善寺 (世田谷区)]]の2件が、標記の活動の取材対象となりました。そのためこれまでウィキペディアの編集に携わったことがなかった方が編集参加しております。本記事である[[二子神社]]は今回のイベントまで記事が存在していなかった項目であり、新規の作成となります。不慣れな編集履歴が散見される可能性がありますが、温かく見守っていただければ幸いです。[[User:さえぼー|さえぼー]]（[[利用者‐会話:さえぼー|会話]]） 2015年11月3日 (火) 06:01 (UTC)
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:34, 26 February 2026 (UTC)

== Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1201760851 revision]) ==
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:34, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
